creator: ds@ukrhub.net
text:
Russian translation of an article doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/cups is
available outside the FreeBSD Documentation Project. Please, insert it
into FDP.

Fix: 

Fetch http://chaos.ukrhub.net/cups/doc.ru.articles.cups.tbz ,
unpack, place unpacked files to the proper directories, and patch
doc/ru_RU.KOI8-R/articles/Makefile with Makefile.diff
How-To-Repeat:   Just check the doc repository.
